name: alpha
description: SDLC lifecycle support — grooming to monitoring, TRD-centered and human-approved at every gate. Jira integration optional.

plugins.name: alpha-sdlc
plugins.description: SDLC support: grooming (product & tech-debt) → planning → development (TDD) → testing, with optional Jira slicing/uploading. Draft + human-approve, reuse-first (the ladder), AC as the contract.
